data.name: Elf World Adventure 5
data.detailed_description:
Gameplay:


Elf World Adventure 5 is the continuation of an H-game in the anime and puzzle genres, immersing you in a captivating world inspired by samurai aesthetics. You'll enjoy many new levels where you collect images of beautiful elf girls dressed in exquisite outfits.

Dive into a magical atmosphere of Eastern culture accompanied by relaxing melodic music. This game will delight you not only with engaging and challenging puzzles but also with numerous achievements that will decorate your Steam profile and highlight your successes in the elf world!

Game Features:


  • Hentai Experience: Enjoy a game that combines puzzles with hentai elements.
  • Samurai Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a magical world of Eastern culture with elegant music.
  • Beautiful Elf Girls: Discover stunning images of elf girls in samurai-style attire.
  • Casual Gameplay: Simple controls and an accessible interface suitable for everyone.
  • Many Levels: Challenge yourself across numerous new levels.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
